/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -m64 -O3 -funroll-loops -Wno-narrowing -Wno-deprecated-register -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/core/particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/core/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/core/spatial_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/core/bvh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/core/wind.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/collision/sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/collision/plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/collision/box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/collision/capsule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/hair/strand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/hair/hairSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/hair/ftlSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/hair/hairInteraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/rendering/strandRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/io/sceneLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/io/objLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/misc/sphere_drawing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/misc/file_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/furreal.dir/camera.cpp.o -o ../furreal  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/yash/Projects/CS_184/cs184-furreal/build/ext/nanogui ../CGL/src/libCGL.a ../ext/nanogui/libnanogui.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework CoreVideo -framework IOKit /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib
